name: IMPERFORATE ANUS
dominant_finding: ≤ 15 mm distance between anal dimple + distal rectal pouch on transperineal images →
distribution: absence of anal characteristics (= hypoechoic circular rim with central echogenic stripe)
discriminating_features: absence of anal characteristics (= hypoechoic circular rim with central echogenic stripe)
distance between rectal air and skin will not accurately outline the extent of atretic rectum and
